name: typical
description: Runtime safe TypeScript transformer using typia

scripts.sample:esm: cd samples/esm && npm install && npm run start
scripts.sample:ttsx: cd samples/ttsx && npm install && npm run start
scripts.sample:tsc: cd samples/tsc && npm install && npm run build && npm run start
scripts.sample:ttsc: cd samples/ttsc && npm install && npm run build && npm run start
scripts.samples: npm run sample:esm && npm run sample:ttsx && npm run sample:tsc && npm run sample:ttsc

author: Elliot Shepherd <elliot@jarofworms.com>
